market: Central Wisconsin (Wausau / Schofield / Weston / Mosinee / Merrill)
notes: Single source of truth for the deck estimator. Edit values here and regenerate the workbook with build_estimator_workbook.py. Review prices quarterly. Cedar pricing is volatile due to 2025-2026 BC mill closures - revisit before major quotes.
open_verification_items: Menards SKU 1110669 (AC2 5/4x6x16 PT decking) - fallback price used; verify in-person
Menards SKU 1072752 (Cedar 2x4x8 S4S) - fallback price used; verify in-person
_color_pricing_note: Each decking/railing material may carry a 'colors' array. A color is {name, optional hex, optional sell_per_sf/sell_per_lf}. If a color omits a price it inherits the line price; a price on the color overrides it. TimberTech color lists + any premium-color upcharges are representative pending final scrape of timbertech.com/order-samples and /products/railing (CONFIRM).
_timbertech_pricing_note: TimberTech sell_per_sf derived from John's supplier cost per LF (Badger=AZEK/PVC, Woodland=PRO/composite, photos 2026-06): material_per_sf = cost_per_lf x 2.18 (5.5in board => 0.458 SF/LF); sell_per_sf = material_per_sf x 2.75 (Trex-implied markup 2.6-2.9x). board_coverage and markup are the two tunable constants. CONFIRM markup with John before quoting a real customer.

decking_materials.name: Pressure-Treated Pine
decking_materials.description: Budget tier. AC2 5/4x6x16 PT decking (Menards SKU 1110669). 8-12 yr life with stain maintenance.

colors.name: Natural (finish via stain - see Stain section)

decking_materials.name: Cedar
decking_materials.description: Mid wood tier. Red Cedar 5/4x6x16 (Menards SKU 1072723 - $35.59 rebate). Natural rot resistance. 15-20 yr life.

colors.name: Natural (finish via stain - see Stain section)

decking_materials.name: Trex Enhance
decking_materials.description: Entry composite. 25-yr warranty. Budget-friendly composite option.

decking_materials.name: Trex Select
decking_materials.description: Mid-tier composite. 35-yr warranty. Most common composite upgrade.

decking_materials.name: Trex Transcend
decking_materials.description: Premium composite. Full grain, deep colors. 50-yr warranty.

decking_materials.name: TimberTech AZEK Harvest
decking_materials.description: Advanced PVC (AZEK), Harvest Collection - refined cathedral grain. Capped polymer, no organic content. Entry AZEK tier.
decking_materials.source: John Garcia / Badger cost sheet 2026-06 ($5.47/LF). sell = 5.47x2.18x2.75. CONFIRM markup.

decking_materials.name: TimberTech AZEK Harvest+
decking_materials.description: Advanced PVC (AZEK), Harvest+ Collection - understated cathedral grain.
decking_materials.source: John Garcia / Badger cost sheet 2026-06 ($6.84/LF). sell = 6.84x2.18x2.75. CONFIRM markup + colors.

decking_materials.name: TimberTech AZEK Landmark
decking_materials.description: Advanced PVC (AZEK), Landmark Collection - crosscut hardwoods, cathedral grain.
decking_materials.source: John Garcia / Badger cost sheet 2026-06 ($6.84/LF). sell = 6.84x2.18x2.75. CONFIRM markup.

decking_materials.name: TimberTech AZEK Vintage
decking_materials.description: Advanced PVC (AZEK), Vintage Collection - exotic hardwoods, wire-brushed finish. Top AZEK tier.
decking_materials.source: John Garcia / Badger cost sheet 2026-06 ($7.91/LF). sell = 7.91x2.18x2.75. CONFIRM markup.

decking_materials.name: TimberTech PRO Terrain
decking_materials.description: Capped composite (PRO), Terrain Collection - rugged cathedral grain. Entry PRO tier.
decking_materials.source: John Garcia / Woodland cost sheet 2026-06 ($4.50/LF). sell = 4.50x2.18x2.75. CONFIRM markup.

decking_materials.name: TimberTech PRO Terrain+
decking_materials.description: Capped composite (PRO), Terrain+ Collection - subtle wood grain.
decking_materials.source: John Garcia / Woodland cost sheet 2026-06 ($4.50/LF). sell = 4.50x2.18x2.75. CONFIRM markup + colors.

decking_materials.name: TimberTech PRO Reserve
decking_materials.description: Capped composite (PRO), Reserve Collection - reclaimed-wood look.
decking_materials.source: John Garcia / Woodland cost sheet 2026-06 ($6.39/LF). sell = 6.39x2.18x2.75. CONFIRM markup.

decking_materials.name: TimberTech PRO Legacy
decking_materials.description: Capped composite (PRO), Legacy Collection - hand-scraped finish. Top PRO tier.
decking_materials.source: John Garcia / Woodland cost sheet 2026-06 ($7.68/LF). sell = 7.68x2.18x2.75. CONFIRM markup.

railing_materials.name: Pressure-Treated Wood Rail
railing_materials.description: PT 2x4 top/bottom rail (Menards SKU 1110818) with PT 2x2 balusters and 4x4 posts. Budget tier.

railing_materials.name: Cedar Wood Rail
railing_materials.description: Cedar 2x4 top/bottom rail (Menards SKU 1072752 - fallback) with cedar balusters. Mid wood tier.

railing_materials.name: Trex Aluminum
railing_materials.description: Trex Signature aluminum rail system. Black/bronze. Lifetime warranty.

railing_materials.name: Cable Railing
railing_materials.description: Feeney CableRail (Menards SKU 6310-PKG) on PT/cedar posts. Full system with top+bot rail. Modern look, view preservation.

railing_materials.name: Glass Panel
railing_materials.description: Tempered glass panel railing with aluminum posts. Premium tier - $60K+ projects only.

railing_materials.name: TimberTech Reliance Rail (Vinyl)
railing_materials.description: Premium vinyl railing, value tier. Low-maintenance. CONFIRM pricing.
railing_materials.source: Market research 2026-06 (TimberTech does not publish; rail material ~$20-60/LF). sell = material x 2.5. CONFIRM.

railing_materials.name: TimberTech Premier Rail (Composite)
railing_materials.description: Composite railing, mid tier. Pairs with PRO/EDGE decking.
railing_materials.source: Market research 2026-06. sell = material x 2.5. CONFIRM.

railing_materials.name: TimberTech Impression Rail Express (Aluminum)
railing_materials.description: Powder-coated aluminum railing, mid tier. Slim sightlines.
railing_materials.source: Market research 2026-06. sell = material x 2.5. CONFIRM.

railing_materials.name: TimberTech RadianceRail (Premium)
railing_materials.description: Premium capped composite/PVC railing, drink-rail capable. Top TimberTech rail tier.
railing_materials.source: Market research 2026-06. sell = material x 2.5. CONFIRM.

framing_materials.name: KDAT Pressure-Treated
framing_materials.description: Kiln-dried-after-treatment PT lumber. Code-compliant for ground contact. CWDB standard.

framing_materials.name: Steel (Fortress Evolution)
framing_materials.description: Galvanized steel deck framing. Premium tier - rare residential WI. Sell on warranty + fire resistance + no rot. Special order through Fortress dealer.

margin_and_contingency.notes: Margin = Cost / (1 - margin_pct), not markup. Contingency creates a low/high range around the sell price.

project_types.name: Stain Only
project_types.description: Refinish-only job. Wash, sand, set fasteners, stain. No structural work.

project_types.name: Stain + Minor Repairs
project_types.description: Stain plus targeted repairs - board swap, joist sister, hardware. Use Repair Bucket for repair scope. For new rail/stair systems, use Resurface or Frame Rebuild.

project_types.name: Resurface (Boards Only)
project_types.description: Pull old boards, inspect frame, install new boards. Optional railing + stair refresh - zero out Railing LF / Stair Runs if not in scope.

project_types.name: Frame + Deck Rebuild (Keep Footings)
project_types.description: Tear out frame and deck down to footings. Build new frame + deck + rails + stairs. Reuse footings.

project_types.name: Full Tear-Out + New Build
project_types.description: Complete demolition including footings. New build from grade up.

project_types.name: New Build (No Tear-Out)
project_types.description: Brand-new deck where none existed. New footings, framing, decking, rails, stairs. No demolition, tear-out, or waste-removal cost.

project_types.name: Fence
project_types.description: Fence build, priced by linear foot. Uses fence_materials (rate by height) + gates + tear-out, not the deck SF model.

fence_materials.name: Wood Privacy (Cedar / PT)
fence_materials.description: Solid-board privacy fence, cedar or treated pine. Most common in Central WI.
fence_materials.source: CONFIRM WITH JOHN - Central WI market est 2026-06

fence_materials.name: Vinyl Privacy
fence_materials.description: Maintenance-free vinyl privacy panels. Popular upgrade.
fence_materials.source: CONFIRM WITH JOHN - Central WI market est 2026-06

fence_materials.name: Aluminum Ornamental
fence_materials.description: Powder-coated aluminum (pool / decorative). Premium tier. No 8 ft option.
fence_materials.source: CONFIRM WITH JOHN - Central WI market est 2026-06

fence_materials.name: Chain Link (Galvanized)
fence_materials.description: Galvanized or vinyl-coated chain link. Value tier, common for pets / yards.
fence_materials.source: CONFIRM WITH JOHN - Central WI market est 2026-06

materials_unit_costs.description: Joist hanger (Simpson LUS28 or equiv) for 2x10 joist
1/2" x 4" hex lag screw (ledger to rim)
3" stainless deck screws, 5 lb box (approx 350 ct)
Hidden deck fasteners (Trex CONNECT or equiv) 50 ct
Concrete mix 60 lb bag (QUIKRETE or equiv)
Trex Signature aluminum railing section, 6 ft kit
Trex Signature aluminum post + base kit
Aluminum glass railing post + glass clamp set
Transparent stain (Ready Seal or equiv) 1 gal
Stain supplies set (brushes, rollers, pads, drop)
